category_sources: source_facts.description says spigot is a command-line streaming exact real calculator; official chiark page repeats that description.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is spigot; official chiark page heading is spigot.
docs_sources: Official chiark page links to the online manual and examples and is the primary official documentation/download surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official spigot page gives git clone https://git.tartarus.org/simon/spigot.git and a web repository browser.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a streaming exact real calculator; source_facts.executables lists spigot; official chiark page explains command-line streaming calculation.
